Integrations

Works with the ecosystem you already use

Cinturon360 is not a rip-and-replace online booking tool. It wraps around your current channels so you can govern bookings made through TMCs, GDS/NDC, direct suppliers, and other connected sources.

Integration ecosystem

Cinturon360 is designed to sit above the booking layer and receive data from whatever channels your organisation or TMC clients use.

✈️

Booking Sources

  • GDS-connected environments
  • NDC pathways
  • TMC-managed workflows
  • Direct supplier channels
  • Client-specific booking processes
📤

Downstream Systems

  • Finance and ERP handoff
  • Expense platform connections
  • Reporting and BI pipelines
  • Procurement system outputs
  • Cost allocation exports
🔌

Platform Connectivity

  • REST API for custom integrations
  • Webhook event delivery
  • Identity provider connections
  • Partner and TMC connectors
  • Extension points for custom workflows

Designed to work alongside

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.

Join Waitlist Book a Demo
Cinturon360

Travel governance, approvals, and visibility for TMCs, corporate, and government travel programs.
